statements.sql: select * from `w_users` where `id` = 1 and `is_demo_agent` = 0 limit 1

select `w_roles`.*, `w_role_user`.`user_id` as `pivot_user_id`, `w_role_user`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `w_role_user`.`created_at` as `pivot_created_at`, `w_role_user`.`updated_at` as `pivot_updated_at` from `w_roles` inner join `w_role_user` on `w_roles`.`id` = `w_role_user`.`role_id` where `w_role_user`.`user_id` in (1) and `w_roles`.`deleted_at` is null

select `w_permissions`.*, `w_permission_role`.`created_at` as `pivot_created_at`, `w_permission_role`.`updated_at` as `pivot_updated_at` from `w_permissions` inner join `w_permission_role` on `w_permission_role`.`permission_id` = `w_permissions`.`id` inner join `w_roles` on `w_roles`.`id` = `w_permission_role`.`role_id` where (`w_roles`.`id` in (6) or `w_roles`.`level` < 6) and `w_permissions`.`deleted_at` is null group by `w_permissions`.`id`, `w_permissions`.`name`, `w_permissions`.`slug`, `w_permissions`.`description`, `w_permissions`.`model`, `w_permissions`.`created_at`, `w_permissions`.`updated_at`, `w_permissions`.`deleted_at`, `pivot_created_at`, `pivot_updated_at`

select `w_permissions`.*, `w_permission_user`.`user_id` as `pivot_user_id`, `w_permission_user`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `w_permission_user`.`created_at` as `pivot_created_at`, `w_permission_user`.`updated_at` as `pivot_updated_at` from `w_permissions` inner join `w_permission_user` on `w_permissions`.`id` = `w_permission_user`.`permission_id` where `w_permission_user`.`user_id` = 1 and `w_permissions`.`deleted_at` is null
select * from `w_users` where `w_users`.`id` = 1 and `is_demo_agent` = 0 limit 1
update `w_users` set `username` = 'Admin', `w_users`.`updated_at` = '2026-04-19 16:17:43' where `id` = 1 and `is_demo_agent` = 0
